Added_Other.name: DFFlagEnableOverridingAndroidExitReasonsAsSuccess
Added_Other.mechanism: Allows the app to treat certain exit reasons on Android as successful exits.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances the reporting of app performance by categorizing exits more accurately.

Added_Other.name: DFFlagSimParentPrimSpacePVsRead
Added_Other.mechanism: Allows reading of parent space properties in simulations.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances the ability to manage and manipulate object properties in games.

Added_Physics.name: DFFlagSimCacheHumanoidScale2
Added_Physics.mechanism: Caches humanoid scale data for better performance.
Added_Physics.purpose: Improves game performance by reducing lag when scaling characters.

Added_Physics.name: DFFlagTriangleMeshPartDefaultCollisionGeometry
Added_Physics.mechanism: Changes the default collision settings for triangle mesh parts in the game.
Added_Physics.purpose: Improves accuracy of collisions, enhancing gameplay realism and reducing glitches.

Changed_Other.name: DFFlagFlagRolloutTestDynamicBool1
Changed_Other.mechanism: Enables a feature toggle for testing dynamic boolean values.
Changed_Other.purpose: Allows players to experience new features in a controlled way.

Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores dynamic string values for version control.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players have access to the latest features and fixes.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Changes how dynamic strings handle timestamps during updates.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures more accurate and timely updates for players.

Changed_Other.name: FFlagFlagRolloutTestStaticBool1
Changed_Other.mechanism: Tests a new feature by toggling a static boolean flag.
Changed_Other.purpose: Allows developers to experiment with new features safely before full rollout.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Uses a fast string representation of the Git hash for version control.
Changed_Other.purpose: Enhances the efficiency of tracking changes in the game's code, leading to smoother updates for players.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString

Changed_Other.purpose: Improves loading times and responsiveness when dealing with time-related data in games.
